title: Padmaavat
tmdbOverview: Rajputana, India, 13th century. The tyrannical usurper Alauddin Khilji, sultan of Delhi, becomes obsessed with Queen Padmavati, wife of King Ratan Singh of Mewar, and goes to great lengths to satisfy his greed for her.
synopsis: Padmaavat is a 2018 drama, history and romance film from India. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (AT rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
